title: CreateTheUltimate
description: A modpack including EVERYTHING from Create over Performance mods to cars and weapons
body:
## About the Modpack
This modpack is created for Forge loader, 1.19.2 it contains everything, for you to drive around in cars fly around your world, building incredible Machines and also fly to the Space!!

About exploration I added **Terralith** and also some of **Yung's better structures**

Not only that, it also looks for your Performance, including Embeddium with its Addons no mather if playing on a Server or on a Single Player World


## How to Install
To install this modpack you eiher download it ([>here<](https://modrinth.com/modpack/createtheultimate/versions)), go to the Modrinth launcher and follow this path: 

**Create Profile (+) → From File → Import From File → Choose the downloaded File** 

or go to the Modrinth Launcher and search for **CreateTheUltimate** to play it
